hero.subtitle: Import and export from China. Wholesale supply and private-label manufacturing with guaranteed quality.

partners.title: We work with leading logistics operators

about.p1: VIING MCHJ XK is a professional team of international trade specialists. We focus on import and export between China and CIS countries.
about.p2: Our mission is to make international trade transparent and accessible to every client, ensuring high product and service quality.
advantages: More than 10 years on the market

services.subtitle: From sourcing the supplier to delivering the goods — we cover every stage

items.title: Import from China
items.description: Direct supply of quality goods from verified Chinese manufacturers with full customs support.

items.title: Export of goods
items.description: Export deliveries of your products to international markets with optimal logistics.

items.title: Wholesale trade

products.subtitle: We work with multiple product categories for any kind of business

process.subtitle: Five steps from the first call to delivery at your warehouse

steps.title: Brief and request
steps.description: We discuss your goal, volumes, budget and timeline. Pick the optimal supply scheme.

steps.title: Supplier sourcing
steps.description: Find and vet factories, agree on samples and specifications.

steps.title: Production control
steps.description: We monitor schedule, quality and packaging. Photo and video reports on request.

steps.title: Logistics and customs
steps.description: Arrange shipping, prepare documents, clear customs end-to-end.

steps.title: Handover and support
steps.description: Deliver the cargo to your warehouse and stay in touch for next shipments.

whyUs.subtitle: We understand how critical reliability is in business. Every step — from picking a supplier to delivery — is under our strict control.

items.title: Quality control
items.description: Inspecting goods against specifications before shipment

items.title: Fast delivery
items.description: Optimal routes and lead times starting from 15 days

items.title: Turnkey service
items.description: End-to-end support: from sourcing to warehouse delivery

faq.subtitle: Didn't find your question? Write to us — we'll reply within a day

items.question: What is your minimum order?
items.answer: We work with shipments starting from 1 container. For LCL — from 100 kg. For large clients we tailor individual terms.

items.question: How long does delivery from China take?
items.answer: Sea — 35–45 days to Tashkent, rail — 18–25 days, air — 5–7 days. Final lead time depends on route, volume and season.

items.question: How do you control product quality?
items.answer: We run a factory inspection before shipment: specifications, packaging, labeling. Photo and video reports for every batch on request.

items.question: Can you handle customs clearance end-to-end?
items.answer: Yes. We handle all documents, certification and customs clearance in Uzbekistan and most CIS countries. You receive the cargo at your warehouse.

items.question: Do you offer deferred payment?
items.answer: For repeat customers and large contracts — discussed individually. Standard terms: 50% prepayment, 50% upon goods readiness.

items.question: Do you do private label (OEM)?
items.answer: Yes. We develop packaging, apply your logo, agree on design with the factory. Minimum batch depends on the category — typically 500–1000 pcs.

contact.subtitle: Ready to discuss your project? Submit a request or message us directly — we usually reply within an hour during business hours.
contact.address: Tashkent, Mirzo-Ulugbek district, Shahriobod mahalla, Oliy Khimmat street, 128-A

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This Policy describes how VIING MCHJ XK (the «Company») processes personal data of users of {url}.
privacy.section1Body: When you submit the contact form we collect: name, phone, email (if provided) and message text. This data is used solely to respond to your request.
section2List: handling inquiries and preparing commercial proposals;
informing you about the status of your requests and shipments.
privacy.section3Body: We do not share your data with third parties, except as required by the law of the Republic of Uzbekistan and our technical contractors (hosting, messengers) acting on our behalf.
privacy.section4Body: Personal data is stored no longer than required for the processing purposes, or until you withdraw your consent.
privacy.section5Body: For personal data questions write to

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using the {url} website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree — please stop using the website.
terms.section1Body: The website is informational and does not constitute a public offer. Exact terms, prices and timelines are agreed individually based on your request.
terms.section2Body: All website materials — texts, images, logos — belong to VIING MCHJ XK or are used with the permission of rights holders. Any use without consent is prohibited.
terms.section3Body: The Company makes reasonable efforts to keep information up to date but does not guarantee its completeness and accuracy in all cases.
terms.section4Body: For questions about the terms of use write to
